title: SR 21-4 / CA 21-2: CA 21-2:  Inactive or Revised SR Letters Related to the Federal Reserve’s Supervisory Expectations for a Firm’s Boards of Directors
title_normalized: CA 21-2:  Inactive or Revised SR Letters Related to the Federal Reserve’s Supervisory Expectations for a Firm’s Boards of Directors
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 21-4 / CA 21-2
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to domestic bank and savings and loan holding companies (including insurance and commercial savings and loan holding companies), regardless of asset size.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 21-4 / CA 21-2 CA 21-2:  Inactive or Revised SR Letters Related to the Federal Reserve’s Supervisory Expectations for a Firm’s Boards of Directors This guidance applies to domestic bank and savings and loan holding companies (including insurance and commercial savings and loan holding companies), regardless of asset size. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE SUBJECT:
